name: Kimi Chat
note: Moonshot's original chatbot; first AI product to ship a lossless 128K-token (~200K-character) context window.

results.notes: SuperCLUE December 2023 Leaderboard, rank 5/17. Source: CLUEbenchmark/SuperCLUE GitHub README table.

verificationNotes: Confirmed genuine: Moonshot AI announced Kimi Chat on 2023-10-09 with open beta 2023-10-10 and general public release 2023-11-16, matching the record's releaseDate exactly; independently confirmed via multiple sources beyond Wikipedia. 128K lossless context (first of its kind) confirmed. moonshot-v1-128k pricing ($2 input/$5 output per 1M tokens) confirmed via platform.kimi.ai pricing docs and third-party pricing trackers. 'Deprecated' status is reasonable given kimi-latest was discontinued Jan 2026 and the product line has moved to K2.x. No changes needed.
